description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.11 Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. Add a before_script that runs go get github.com/pkg/browser and go get gitlab.com/golang-commonmark/markdown for all jobs. In the build stage add a job named build that executes go build ./.... In the test stage add a job named test that runs test -z "$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)" followed by go test ./.... No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are needed.
